---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the concrete problem or gap you are experiencing.
Avoid describing the solution here — describe the need.

## Proposed approach

If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it here.
Note which invariants (I-SEC1–I-SEC12) are affected and how your
proposal preserves them.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider? Why is this approach better?

## Additional context

Any references, prior art, or related issues.
